hero.title: Khaled Hussien Abdel-Motaal
hero.subtitle:
Welcome to my world of engineering innovation.
Driving digital transformation in the AEC industry through BIM systems, automation, and intelligent engineering workflows

about.title: About Me
about.description: I build intelligent tools and scalable systems that empower engineering teams to design, coordinate, and deliver projects more efficiently, while reducing errors and optimizing workflows. My work bridges the gap between technical precision and practical execution, helping companies transform their operations and achieve measurable results.

bimDev.title: BIM Development
bimDev.description: Specialized in designing and implementing custom BIM tools to optimize workflows, coordinate multidisciplinary teams, and ensure high-quality project delivery. Skilled in process analysis, developing scalable smart solutions, and linking project data to support efficient decision-making.

software.title: Software Engineering
software.description: Strong programming experience within the engineering context, creating maintainable and scalable tools and systems. Focused on applying software engineering principles to enhance BIM team performance and productivity.

dynamo.title: Dynamo & Visual Programming
dynamo.description: Design and implementation of Dynamo scripts to automate modeling and design tasks, improve workflow efficiency, reduce human errors, and seamlessly connect Revit with project data.

digitalTransformation.title: Digital Transformation & Workflow Optimization
digitalTransformation.description: Designing integrated digital solutions to convert traditional workflows into intelligent digital environments using BIM and automation, boosting productivity, reducing time/resource waste, and enabling highly effective project teams.

bim.title: Custom BIM Tools
bim.description: Tailored solutions designed to streamline BIM workflows, automate repetitive tasks, and enhance collaboration across engineering teams.

automation.title: AEC Automation Scripts
automation.description: Efficient scripts and workflows that reduce manual effort, accelerate project delivery, and ensure consistency in engineering processes.

integration.title: Software & Dashboard Integration
integration.description: Seamless integration of AEC software, data, and dashboards to unify tools, optimize workflows, and provide actionable insights.

info.title: Let's Connect
info.description: Feel free to reach out for collaborations or just a friendly chat. I'm always open to discussing new projects or opportunities.

availability.title: Availability
availability.description: Currently available for freelance projects and collaborations. Let's create something amazing together!

items.question: What types of projects do you work on?
items.answer: I specialize in advanced BIM projects, automation solutions, and digital transformation for engineering and construction companies. Projects include developing custom tools, optimizing workflows, and connecting multidisciplinary teams to ensure efficient project delivery.

items.question: How do you manage remote collaboration?
items.answer: I leverage cloud-based BIM platforms, modern project management tools, and regular communication to coordinate remote teams. I integrate automation and advanced technologies to enable real-time data sharing and updates.

items.question: What is the typical project timeline?
items.answer: It depends on project complexity and size, typically ranging from one month to six months or more. I provide detailed plans with clear milestones, review points, and tracking tools to ensure deadlines are met and results are achieved.

items.question: Do you offer training or workshops?
items.answer: Yes, I provide tailored workshops and training sessions in BIM and automation, designed according to team size and expertise level, focusing on practical applications that can be immediately implemented in projects.

items.question: How can my company benefit from your services?
items.answer: I analyze your company's needs and design smart tools and systems that fit your current workflows, increasing productivity, reducing errors, and enabling efficient digital transformation.
